title: Apple’s Wafer Demand Model: Forecast Analysis (2026-2030)
title_translation: 苹果晶圆需求模型：预测分析（2026-2030）

paragraphs.source: N2 Breaks the Pattern
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: ### N2 Breaks the Pattern
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: N2 Breaks the Pattern

pro.text: N2 打破既定格局

issues.description: 译文“台积电份额回升”存在歧义，容易被误解为“台积电的市场份额回升”。根据下文“Apple’s share of total TSMC revenue will likely recover”，这里指的是苹果在台积电总营收中所占的份额回升。
“已让客户结构发生了结构性转变”中的“让……发生了”略显口语化，且“发生”与“结构性转变”搭配稍显冗长。
“N系列”、“C系列”、“AI加速器”等词汇中，英文字母/缩写与中文字符之间缺少标准的中英文字符间距（半角空格）。该问题在第2、4、7、14、15、16段中多次出现。
译文“还尚未问世”存在轻微的语义重复，“还”和“尚未”在表达“未发生”时功能重叠。
“每月晶圆投片量（wspm）”翻译正确但略显生硬，wspm (wafers starts per month) 在半导体行业中文里有更标准的惯用表述。

paragraphs.source: N2 enters production in 2025 with 234K wafers and scales rapidly to 778K by 2027. The volume trajectory looks familiar. But Apple’s share tells a different story.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: N2 enters production in 2025 with 234K wafers and scales rapidly to 778K by 2027. The volume trajectory looks familiar. But Apple’s share tells a different story.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: N2 enters production in 2025 with 234K wafers and scales rapidly to 778K by 2027. The volume trajectory looks familiar. But Apple’s share tells a different story.

pro.text: N2 将于 2025 年投入量产，初始产能为 23.4 万片晶圆，到 2027 年将迅速攀升至 77.8 万片。这一产能轨迹似曾相识。然而，苹果的份额却呈现出截然不同的景象。

issues.description: 译文“台积电份额回升”存在歧义，容易被误解为“台积电的市场份额回升”。根据下文“Apple’s share of total TSMC revenue will likely recover”，这里指的是苹果在台积电总营收中所占的份额回升。
“已让客户结构发生了结构性转变”中的“让……发生了”略显口语化，且“发生”与“结构性转变”搭配稍显冗长。
“N系列”、“C系列”、“AI加速器”等词汇中，英文字母/缩写与中文字符之间缺少标准的中英文字符间距（半角空格）。该问题在第2、4、7、14、15、16段中多次出现。
译文“还尚未问世”存在轻微的语义重复，“还”和“尚未”在表达“未发生”时功能重叠。
“每月晶圆投片量（wspm）”翻译正确但略显生硬，wspm (wafers starts per month) 在半导体行业中文里有更标准的惯用表述。

paragraphs.source: At peak, Apple takes 48% of N2 revenue. That is down from 75% on N5 and 92% on N3. For the first time in a decade, Apple is not the dominant customer on the newest leading-edge node. AI accelerator demand from hyperscalers has structurally shifted the customer mix.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: At peak, Apple takes 48% of N2 revenue. That is down from 75% on N5 and 92% on N3. For the first time in a decade, Apple is not the dominant customer on the newest leading-edge node. AI accelerator demand from hyperscalers has structurally shifted the customer mix.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: At peak, Apple takes 48% of N2 revenue. That is down from 75% on N5 and 92% on N3. For the first time in a decade, Apple is not the dominant customer on the newest leading-edge node. AI accelerator demand from hyperscalers has structurally shifted the customer mix.

pro.text: 在峰值时期，苹果占据了 N2 营收的 48%。这一比例低于 N5 的 75% 和 N3 的 92%。十年来，苹果首次不再是最新先进制程节点上的主导客户。来自超大规模云厂商的 AI加速器需求已从结构上重塑了客户组合。

paragraphs.source: N3 Decays Fast
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: ### N3 Decays Fast
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: N3 Decays Fast

pro.text: N3 需求急速衰退

issues.description: 译文“台积电份额回升”存在歧义，容易被误解为“台积电的市场份额回升”。根据下文“Apple’s share of total TSMC revenue will likely recover”，这里指的是苹果在台积电总营收中所占的份额回升。
“已让客户结构发生了结构性转变”中的“让……发生了”略显口语化，且“发生”与“结构性转变”搭配稍显冗长。
“N系列”、“C系列”、“AI加速器”等词汇中，英文字母/缩写与中文字符之间缺少标准的中英文字符间距（半角空格）。该问题在第2、4、7、14、15、16段中多次出现。
译文“还尚未问世”存在轻微的语义重复，“还”和“尚未”在表达“未发生”时功能重叠。
“每月晶圆投片量（wspm）”翻译正确但略显生硬，wspm (wafers starts per month) 在半导体行业中文里有更标准的惯用表述。

paragraphs.source: N3 peaks at 639K wafers in 2025, falls to 357K by 2027, and drops to 141K by 2030. That is a 78% decline in five years, faster than any prior node decay. Apple is not keeping N3 alive for legacy products the way it sustained older nodes. Once the transition begins, the exit is rapid. This is mostly due transition to N2 and Apple’a vacated capacity will be picked up by AI accelerators. TSMC, most recently, even expanded N3 capacity by 30-40k wspm to accommodate incoming accelerator demand.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: N3 peaks at 639K wafers in 2025, falls to 357K by 2027, and drops to 141K by 2030. That is a 78% decline in five years, faster than any prior node decay. Apple is not keeping N3 alive for legacy products the way it sustained older nodes. Once the transition begins, the exit is rapid. This is mostly due transition to N2 and Apple’a vacated capacity will be picked up by AI accelerators. TSMC, most recently, even expanded N3 capacity by 30-40k wspm to accommodate incoming accelerator demand.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: N3 peaks at 639K wafers in 2025, falls to 357K by 2027, and drops to 141K by 2030. That is a 78% decline in five years, faster than any prior node decay. Apple is not keeping N3 alive for legacy products the way it sustained older nodes. Once the transition begins, the exit is rapid. This is mostly due transition to N2 and Apple’a vacated capacity will be picked up by AI accelerators. TSMC, most recently, even expanded N3 capacity by 30-40k wspm to accommodate incoming accelerator demand.

pro.text: N3 晶圆需求在 2025 年达到 63.9 万片的峰值，到 2027 年降至 35.7 万片，并于 2030 年一路陡降至 14.1 万片。五年内降幅高达 78%，衰退速度超过以往任何制程节点。苹果并未像维持旧制程节点那样，为了旧款产品而保留 N3 产能。一旦开始过渡，撤出速度极快。这主要归因于向 N2 的过渡，而苹果腾出的产能将被 AI加速器接盘。台积电近期甚至扩充了 3 万至 4 万片晶圆月投片量（wspm）的 N3 产能，以满足涌入的加速器需求。

paragraphs.source: N5 Gets a Second Life
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: ### N5 Gets a Second Life
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: N5 Gets a Second Life

pro.text: N5 迎来第二春

issues.description: 译文“台积电份额回升”存在歧义，容易被误解为“台积电的市场份额回升”。根据下文“Apple’s share of total TSMC revenue will likely recover”，这里指的是苹果在台积电总营收中所占的份额回升。

paragraphs.source: N5 is the first Apple node to show a U-shaped recovery. It bottoms at 157K wafers in 2025, then climbs back to 434K by 2030. Prior nodes decayed monotonically; N5 rebounds.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: N5 is the first Apple node to show a U-shaped recovery. It bottoms at 157K wafers in 2025, then climbs back to 434K by 2030. Prior nodes decayed monotonically; N5 rebounds.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: N5 is the first Apple node to show a U-shaped recovery. It bottoms at 157K wafers in 2025, then climbs back to 434K by 2030. Prior nodes decayed monotonically; N5 rebounds.

pro.text: N5 是首个呈现 U 型复苏的苹果制程节点。其晶圆需求在 2025 年触底至 15.7 万片，随后在 2030 年攀升回 43.4 万片。以往的制程节点均呈单调衰退；N5 却迎来了反弹。

译文“还尚未问世”存在轻微的语义重复，“还”和“尚未”在表达“未发生”时功能重叠。
“每月晶圆投片量（wspm）”翻译正确但略显生硬，wspm (wafers starts per month) 在半导体行业中文里有更标准的惯用表述。

paragraphs.source: The likely explanation is cost optimization. Apple is repurposing mature N5 capacity for lower-ASP products: entry-level Macs, older iPhone variants, modem and connectivity chips (C-series/N-series), RF chips, and high-volume accessories. Revenue grows slower than volume on this node, confirming the ASP decline.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The likely explanation is cost optimization. Apple is repurposing mature N5 capacity for lower-ASP products: entry-level Macs, older iPhone variants, modem and connectivity chips (C-series/N-series), RF chips, and high-volume accessories. Revenue grows slower than volume on this node, confirming the ASP decline.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The likely explanation is cost optimization. Apple is repurposing mature N5 capacity for lower-ASP products: entry-level Macs, older iPhone variants, modem and connectivity chips (C-series/N-series), RF chips, and high-volume accessories. Revenue grows slower than volume on this node, confirming the ASP decline.

pro.text: 这很可能是出于成本优化的考量。苹果正将成熟的 N5 产能重新用于平均售价（ASP）较低的产品：入门级 Mac、旧款 iPhone、调制解调器与连接芯片（C系列/N系列）、射频芯片以及大批量生产的配件。该制程节点上的营收增速低于晶圆量增速，印证了 ASP 的下降。

paragraphs.source: 1.4nm: Apple Dominance Returns
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: ### 1.4nm: Apple Dominance Returns
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: 1.4nm: Apple Dominance Returns

pro.text: 1.4nm：苹果重夺主导权

issues.description: 译文“台积电份额回升”存在歧义，容易被误解为“台积电的市场份额回升”。根据下文“Apple’s share of total TSMC revenue will likely recover”，这里指的是苹果在台积电总营收中所占的份额回升。

paragraphs.source: 1.4nm enters in 2029 at 307K wafers and explodes to 808K by 2030. That exceeds N5’s all-time peak of 689K. The ramp is the steepest in the dataset, with year-one volume surpassing year-two volume on N3.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: 1.4nm enters in 2029 at 307K wafers and explodes to 808K by 2030. That exceeds N5’s all-time peak of 689K. The ramp is the steepest in the dataset, with year-one volume surpassing year-two volume on N3.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: 1.4nm enters in 2029 at 307K wafers and explodes to 808K by 2030. That exceeds N5’s all-time peak of 689K. The ramp is the steepest in the dataset, with year-one volume surpassing year-two volume on N3.

pro.text: 1.4nm 晶圆需求在 2029 年起步时为 30.7 万片，到 2030 年暴涨至 80.8 万片。这一数字超越了 N5 历史峰值的 68.9 万片。其产能爬坡曲线是整个数据集中最陡峭的，首年产量甚至超过了 N3 的次年产量。

paragraphs.source: Apple’s share of 1.4nm is projected at 67%. After ceding ground on N2, Apple reclaims node leadership on the next frontier. The pattern suggests Apple is front-loading capacity commitments to lock in supply before competitors can scale.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Apple’s share of 1.4nm is projected at 67%. After ceding ground on N2, Apple reclaims node leadership on the next frontier. The pattern suggests Apple is front-loading capacity commitments to lock in supply before competitors can scale.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Apple’s share of 1.4nm is projected at 67%. After ceding ground on N2, Apple reclaims node leadership on the next frontier. The pattern suggests Apple is front-loading capacity commitments to lock in supply before competitors can scale.

pro.text: 预计苹果将占据 1.4nm 产能的 67%。在 N2 节点上让步后，苹果在下一个前沿制程节点重夺领导地位。这种模式表明，苹果正在前置产能承诺，抢在竞争对手扩大规模前锁定供应。

“已让客户结构发生了结构性转变”中的“让……发生了”略显口语化，且“发生”与“结构性转变”搭配稍显冗长。
“N系列”、“C系列”、“AI加速器”等词汇中，英文字母/缩写与中文字符之间缺少标准的中英文字符间距（半角空格）。该问题在第2、4、7、14、15、16段中多次出现。
译文“还尚未问世”存在轻微的语义重复，“还”和“尚未”在表达“未发生”时功能重叠。
“每月晶圆投片量（wspm）”翻译正确但略显生硬，wspm (wafers starts per month) 在半导体行业中文里有更标准的惯用表述。

paragraphs.source: Two entirely new chip families appear in 2025 and together account for roughly a third of Apple’s incremental wafer demand through 2030.

pro.text: 2025 年将出现两个全新的芯片系列。到 2030 年，它们合计约占苹果新增晶圆需求的三分之一。

paragraphs.source: N-series ramps 2.5x in its first year, jumping from 4.5K to 11.4K monthly wafers. Then it nearly flatlines for four years. The profile suggests a defined product category, likely Apple’s neural engine or dedicated AI accelerator, that scales with device attach rates rather than representing a new growth vector in itself.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: N-series ramps 2.5x in its first year, jumping from 4.5K to 11.4K monthly wafers. Then it nearly flatlines for four years. The profile suggests a defined product category, likely Apple’s neural engine or dedicated AI accelerator, that scales with device attach rates rather than representing a new growth vector in itself.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: N-series ramps 2.5x in its first year, jumping from 4.5K to 11.4K monthly wafers. Then it nearly flatlines for four years. The profile suggests a defined product category, likely Apple’s neural engine or dedicated AI accelerator, that scales with device attach rates rather than representing a new growth vector in itself.

pro.text: N系列在首年实现 2.5 倍的产能爬坡，月度晶圆需求从 4500 片跃升至 1.14 万片。随后四年则几乎走平。这种曲线特征表明它属于特定产品类别，很可能是苹果的神经网络引擎或专用 AI加速器。其需求随设备搭载率同步增长，而非自身代表新的增长引擎。

paragraphs.source: C-series shows a different shape. It grows 6x from 2025 to 2028 (3.1K to 17.0K monthly), then plateaus. The curve is concave: growth decelerates each year. This matches a new product launch curve where early adopters drive initial volumes, then growth slows as the market matures. Vision Pro and spatial computing fit this profile.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: C-series shows a different shape. It grows 6x from 2025 to 2028 (3.1K to 17.0K monthly), then plateaus. The curve is concave: growth decelerates each year. This matches a new product launch curve where early adopters drive initial volumes, then growth slows as the market matures. Vision Pro and spatial computing fit this profile.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: C-series shows a different shape. It grows 6x from 2025 to 2028 (3.1K to 17.0K monthly), then plateaus. The curve is concave: growth decelerates each year. This matches a new product launch curve where early adopters drive initial volumes, then growth slows as the market matures. Vision Pro and spatial computing fit this profile.

pro.text: C系列则呈现出不同的形态。从 2025 年到 2028 年，其需求增长 6 倍（月度晶圆从 3100 片增至 1.7 万片），随后进入平台期。这是一条凹型增长（增速递减）曲线：增速逐年放缓。这符合新产品的发布曲线：早期采用者推高初始销量，随后随着市场成熟，增长逐渐放缓。Vision Pro 与空间计算正符合这一特征。

paragraphs.source: Apple’s wafer demand at TSMC grew triple digits annually from 2008-2011 as iPhone and iPad scaled. Growth moderated to single digits by 2022 and turned negative in 2023-2024 as device shipments plateaued. The 2020 spike of 37% marked the last major inflection, driven by 5G iPhone and M1 Mac launches. We project 9% wafer growth for Apple from 2025-2030.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Apple’s wafer demand at TSMC grew triple digits annually from 2008-2011 as iPhone and iPad scaled. Growth moderated to single digits by 2022 and turned negative in 2023-2024 as device shipments plateaued. The 2020 spike of 37% marked the last major inflection, driven by 5G iPhone and M1 Mac launches. We project 9% wafer growth for Apple from 2025-2030.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Apple’s wafer demand at TSMC grew triple digits annually from 2008-2011 as iPhone and iPad scaled. Growth moderated to single digits by 2022 and turned negative in 2023-2024 as device shipments plateaued. The 2020 spike of 37% marked the last major inflection, driven by 5G iPhone and M1 Mac launches. We project 9% wafer growth for Apple from 2025-2030.

pro.text: 2008 年至 2011 年间，随着 iPhone 和 iPad 规模扩张，苹果对台积电的晶圆需求实现连年三位数增长。到 2022 年，由于终端设备出货量步入平台期，增速回落至个位数，并在 2023 至 2024 年转为负增长。2020 年高达 37% 的激增是上一次重大拐点，主要由 5G iPhone 和 M1 Mac 的发布双重驱动。我们预计，2025 至 2030 年间苹果的晶圆需求将保持 9% 的增长。

paragraphs.source: Apple’s annual foundry spend at TSMC grew from $2.3 billion in 2014 to nearly $75 billion by 2030, a 32x increase in 16 years. The only down year was 2023, when revenue dipped 1.3% as the N5-to-N3 transition caused a temporary node gap. Despite this growth, Apple’s share of TSMC’s total revenue peaked at 25.5% in 2021 and has since oscillated between 19% and 26%, a reminder that Apple’s spend is growing but TSMC’s AI-driven revenue is growing just as fast.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Apple’s annual foundry spend at TSMC grew from $2.3 billion in 2014 to nearly $75 billion by 2030, a 32x increase in 16 years. The only down year was 2023, when revenue dipped 1.3% as the N5-to-N3 transition caused a temporary node gap. Despite this growth, Apple’s share of TSMC’s total revenue peaked at 25.5% in 2021 and has since oscillated between 19% and 26%, a reminder that Apple’s spend is growing but TSMC’s AI-driven revenue is growing just as fast.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Apple’s annual foundry spend at TSMC grew from $2.3 billion in 2014 to nearly $75 billion by 2030, a 32x increase in 16 years. The only down year was 2023, when revenue dipped 1.3% as the N5-to-N3 transition caused a temporary node gap. Despite this growth, Apple’s share of TSMC’s total revenue peaked at 25.5% in 2021 and has since oscillated between 19% and 26%, a reminder that Apple’s spend is growing but TSMC’s AI-driven revenue is growing just as fast.

pro.text: 苹果在台积电的年度晶圆代工支出从 2014 年的 23 亿美元飙升至 2030 年的近 750 亿美元，16 年间狂飙 32 倍。唯一下滑的年份是 2023 年，当时 N5 向 N3 过渡引发了暂时的制程节点空档期，导致营收微降 1.3%。尽管支出规模持续扩张，苹果占台积电总营收的份额在 2021 年触及 25.5% 的历史高点后，便一直在 19% 至 26% 之间震荡。这表明，尽管苹果的支出在不断攀升，但台积电由 AI 驱动的营收增速同样迅猛。

paragraphs.source: Apple’s annual wafer demand at TSMC more than quadrupled between 2014 and 2030. Growth was not linear: it came in waves aligned with node transitions, with the steepest jumps in 2020-2021 (25% and 23% respectively) as N5 and Apple Silicon ramped simultaneously. The only back-to-back negative years in the dataset were 2023-2024, when demand contracted as the N5-to-N3 transition created a temporary gap. The 2026 rebound of over 17% signals the start of the next growth phase as N2 scales and new chip families reach volume.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Apple’s annual wafer demand at TSMC more than quadrupled between 2014 and 2030. Growth was not linear: it came in waves aligned with node transitions, with the steepest jumps in 2020-2021 (25% and 23% respectively) as N5 and Apple Silicon ramped simultaneously. The only back-to-back negative years in the dataset were 2023-2024, when demand contracted as the N5-to-N3 transition created a temporary gap. The 2026 rebound of over 17% signals the start of the next growth phase as N2 scales and new chip families reach volume.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Apple’s annual wafer demand at TSMC more than quadrupled between 2014 and 2030. Growth was not linear: it came in waves aligned with node transitions, with the steepest jumps in 2020-2021 (25% and 23% respectively) as N5 and Apple Silicon ramped simultaneously. The only back-to-back negative years in the dataset were 2023-2024, when demand contracted as the N5-to-N3 transition created a temporary gap. The 2026 rebound of over 17% signals the start of the next growth phase as N2 scales and new chip families reach volume.

pro.text: 2014 年至 2030 年间，苹果对台积电的年度晶圆需求量翻了四倍有余。这种增长并非线性，而是与制程节点迭代同频共振，呈波浪式推进。最陡峭的跃升出现在 2020 至 2021 年（分别增长 25% 和 23%），当时 N5 与苹果自研芯片同步开启产能爬坡。数据集中仅有的连续负增长出现在 2023 至 2024 年，当时 N5 向 N3 过渡造成了暂时的空档期，导致需求收缩。2026 年超 17% 的反弹则标志着新一轮增长周期的开启，届时 N2 将实现规模化量产，全新芯片系列也将开始放量。

issues.description: 译文“台积电份额回升”存在歧义，容易被误解为“台积电的市场份额回升”。根据下文“Apple’s share of total TSMC revenue will likely recover”，这里指的是苹果在台积电总营收中所占的份额回升。
“已让客户结构发生了结构性转变”中的“让……发生了”略显口语化，且“发生”与“结构性转变”搭配稍显冗长。
“N系列”、“C系列”、“AI加速器”等词汇中，英文字母/缩写与中文字符之间缺少标准的中英文字符间距（半角空格）。该问题在第2、4、7、14、15、16段中多次出现。
译文“还尚未问世”存在轻微的语义重复，“还”和“尚未”在表达“未发生”时功能重叠。
“每月晶圆投片量（wspm）”翻译正确但略显生硬，wspm (wafers starts per month) 在半导体行业中文里有更标准的惯用表述。

paragraphs.source: Apple’s share of total TSMC revenue will likely recover as Apple transitions to higher priced A14 node in 2029, boosting its revenue contribution to TSMC.

pro.text: 随着苹果在 2029 年过渡到定价更高的 A14 制程节点，其在台积电总营收中的占比有望回升。这将提升苹果对台积电的营收贡献。

paragraphs.source: The cycle appears consistent with prior patterns. Apple’s share spikes at node launches, fades as competitors scale, then spikes again when the next node arrives. The long-term mean remains around 20%.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The cycle appears consistent with prior patterns. Apple’s share spikes at node launches, fades as competitors scale, then spikes again when the next node arrives. The long-term mean remains around 20%.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The cycle appears consistent with prior patterns. Apple’s share spikes at node launches, fades as competitors scale, then spikes again when the next node arrives. The long-term mean remains around 20%.

pro.text: 这一周期与过往规律如出一辙。苹果的份额在制程节点发布时飙升，随着竞争对手扩大规模而回落，并在下一个制程节点到来时再次飙升。长期平均值始终保持在 20% 左右。

paragraphs.source: TSMC's A16 (N2) is architected for HPC workloads. Backside power delivery, gate-all-around transistors, and thermal envelopes are optimized for data center power budgets, not smartphone battery constraints. Nvidia benefits disproportionately. Apple may adopt A16 for the future A21/M6 Pro generation, but the node's design tradeoffs favor Nvidia's use case over Apple's. This is why Apple's share drops to 48% on N2. Apple did not lose leverage. The node was built for a different customer.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: TSMC's A16 (N2) is architected for HPC workloads. Backside power delivery, gate-all-around transistors, and thermal envelopes are optimized for data center power budgets, not smartphone battery constraints. Nvidia benefits disproportionately. Apple may adopt A16 for the future A21/M6 Pro generation, but the node's design tradeoffs favor Nvidia's use case over Apple's. This is why Apple's share drops to 48% on N2. Apple did not lose leverage. The node was built for a different customer.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: TSMC's A16 (N2) is architected for HPC workloads. Backside power delivery, gate-all-around transistors, and thermal envelopes are optimized for data center power budgets, not smartphone battery constraints. Nvidia benefits disproportionately. Apple may adopt A16 for the future A21/M6 Pro generation, but the node's design tradeoffs favor Nvidia's use case over Apple's. This is why Apple's share drops to 48% on N2. Apple did not lose leverage. The node was built for a different customer.

pro.text: 台积电的 A16（N2）制程节点专为 HPC 工作负载而设计。背面供电、环绕栅极晶体管以及热设计边界均针对数据中心功耗预算量身定制，而非迁就智能手机的电池瓶颈。英伟达成为最大受益者。苹果可能会在未来的 A21/M6 Pro 芯片世代中采用 A16 节点，但该制程节点的设计取舍更契合英伟达的应用场景，而非苹果。这正是苹果在 N2 节点上的份额跌至 48% 的原因。苹果并未丧失话语权。只是该制程节点本就为另一类客户而生。

paragraphs.source: A14 (1.4nm) rebalances the equation. TSMC is designing A14 for both mobile and HPC from the start, with the HPC-focused A14 SPR coming after the mobile-oriented A14 base process. Power efficiency curves favor consumer devices again. Our model shows Apple reclaims 67% node share on A14, its highest since N3. The timing aligns with Apple’s product cadence: A23 Pro and M8 in 2029-2030.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: A14 (1.4nm) rebalances the equation. TSMC is designing A14 for both mobile and HPC from the start, with the HPC-focused A14 SPR coming after the mobile-oriented A14 base process. Power efficiency curves favor consumer devices again. Our model shows Apple reclaims 67% node share on A14, its highest since N3. The timing aligns with Apple’s product cadence: A23 Pro and M8 in 2029-2030.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: A14 (1.4nm) rebalances the equation. TSMC is designing A14 for both mobile and HPC from the start, with the HPC-focused A14 SPR coming after the mobile-oriented A14 base process. Power efficiency curves favor consumer devices again. Our model shows Apple reclaims 67% node share on A14, its highest since N3. The timing aligns with Apple’s product cadence: A23 Pro and M8 in 2029-2030.

pro.text: A14（1.4nm）制程节点重新平衡了这一局面。台积电从一开始就将 A14 节点设计为兼顾移动端与 HPC，主打移动端的 A14 基础工艺率先登场，随后才是主攻 HPC 的 A14 SPR。能效曲线再次向消费级设备倾斜。我们的模型显示，苹果在 A14 节点上收复了 67% 的制程节点份额，创下自 N3 以来的新高。这一时间点与苹果的产品节奏完美契合：即 2029 至 2030 年间推出的 A23 Pro 和 M8 芯片。

paragraphs.source: Consensus reads Apple’s N2 share decline as permanent displacement. The node roadmap says otherwise. A16 is Nvidia’s node. A14 is Apple’s comeback.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Consensus reads Apple’s N2 share decline as permanent displacement. The node roadmap says otherwise. A16 is Nvidia’s node. A14 is Apple’s comeback.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Consensus reads Apple’s N2 share decline as permanent displacement. The node roadmap says otherwise. A16 is Nvidia’s node. A14 is Apple’s comeback.

pro.text: 市场共识将苹果在 N2 节点上的份额下滑解读为永久性失势。但制程节点路线图给出了不同的答案。A16 是英伟达的制程节点（译注：这里的 A16 指台积电的 1.6 纳米埃米级节点，而非苹果处理器）。A14 则是苹果的王者归来。
